skills.name: web_search
skills.description: Search the web for information using natural language queries. Returns summaries and sources from live web results.

skills.name: web_browse
skills.description: Navigate to and extract content from specific web URLs. Good for reading data portals, documentation, and landing pages.

skills.name: code_execution
skills.description: Execute arbitrary Python code in an isolated subprocess. Use for data transformation, statistical analysis, geospatial processing, knowledge graph modeling, ontology engineering, RDF serialization, data visualization, document parsing, and any computation task. Always print() results to capture them.

skills.name: document_parsing
skills.description: Parse and extract information from documents (PDFs, docs, etc.) using Python libraries like pypdf, docling, or BeautifulSoup.

skills.name: geospatial_processing
skills.description: Process and analyze geospatial data using Python libraries such as geopandas, shapely, and fiona.

skills.name: data_transformation
skills.description: Clean, normalize, and manipulate data structures using Python (pandas, polars).

skills.name: image_analysis
skills.description: Perform image processing and computer vision tasks using libraries like OpenCV, Pillow, or scikit-image.

skills.name: statistical_analysis
skills.description: Run statistical tests, regressions, and data modeling using scipy, statsmodels, or scikit-learn.

skills.name: ontology_modeling_and_serialization
skills.description: Design and implement ontologies and knowledge graphs using rdflib, networkx, or owlready2.

skills.name: api_integration
skills.description: Interact with external REST or GraphQL APIs using Python's requests or httpx libraries.

skills.name: data_visualization
skills.description: Create charts, graphs, and visual representations of data using Python libraries such as matplotlib, seaborn, or plotly via the code_execution tool.

skills.name: remote_sensing_analysis
skills.description: Perform analysis on satellite and aerial imagery by combining image processing, geospatial data handling, and API-based data retrieval. Uses Python libraries like rasterio, rioxarray, and geopandas within the code_execution environment.

skills.name: database_query
skills.description: Query and interact with databases (SQL, NoSQL, etc.) by writing and executing Python code using appropriate libraries (e.g., sqlite3, sqlalchemy, pymongo).

skills.name: medical_literature_research
skills.description: Find, retrieve, and summarize medical research papers and clinical evidence using web search and browsing.

skills.name: healthcare_policy_analysis
skills.description: Analyze healthcare policies and regulatory frameworks by retrieving documents from the web and parsing them for key insights.

skills.name: medical_data_extraction
skills.description: Extract structured data from medical documents, reports, or records using parsing and transformation techniques.

skills.name: local_directory_search
skills.description: Search for files and content within a local file system using Python's directory traversal capabilities.

skills.name: clinical_trials_search
skills.description: Identify and extract information about clinical trials from registry websites and APIs.

skills.name: document_generation
skills.description: Create and format documents (PDFs, reports, etc.) programmatically using Python libraries.

skills.name: dataset_inspection
skills.description: Download a dataset from a URL and inspect its actual contents — schema, column types, shape, sample rows, and null counts. Supports CSV, Parquet, Excel, JSON, and JSONL. Use this to look inside a dataset, not just its landing page.

skills.name: pdf_extraction
skills.description: Download a PDF from a URL and extract its full text — ideal for research papers, reports, and documentation. Returns page count and extracted text.

skills.name: schedule_modeling
skills.description: Model, simulate, and optimize schedules, timelines, and resource allocations using graph theory (networkx), mathematical optimization (scipy/pulp), and temporal data manipulation.

skills.name: report_generation
skills.description: Programmatically generate and format structured reports and documents (PDF, Markdown) to communicate research findings and data analysis results.

skills.name: environmental_policy_analysis
skills.description: Analyze environmental policies, regulatory frameworks, and compliance standards by retrieving official documents from the web, extracting relevant clauses, and synthesizing insights using data analysis and document parsing tools.

skills.name: german_healthcare_expertise
skills.description: Research and interpret the German healthcare system, including its regulatory framework (SGB), insurance structures (GKV/PKV), and clinical standards. This is achieved by searching official German portals, browsing regulatory documents, and applying healthcare policy analysis techniques to the retrieved information.

skills.name: german_language_analysis
skills.description: Extract, process, and analyze German-language text from various sources. This includes parsing German documents, scraping German websites, and using Python-based text processing or the agent's multilingual reasoning to interpret linguistic nuances and data.
